title: cyanus elbrusensis
intro: Cyanus elbrusensis, also known as Elbrus Cornflower, is a plant species native to the Caucasus region, characterized by its blue-violet flowers and grayish-green foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyanus elbrusensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often used to soothe coughs and colds, as well as to calm digestive issues.
